title: salix × pseudoelaeagnos
intro: Salix × pseudoelaeagnos, also known as the pseudo-elaeagnos willow, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae) and is a cross between a Salix and Elaeagnus species. The pseudo-elaeagnos willow has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Salix × pseudoelaeagnos can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and skin infections.
